ai_assistant.title: Property Assistant
ai_assistant.subtitle: Ask for personalized recommendations, budget guidance, and listing discovery help.
ai_assistant.guest_description: Your assistant can use your account context to tailor listing suggestions and conversations.
ai_assistant.chat_description: Describe what you need and the assistant will answer in context.
ai_assistant.empty_description: Try asking for neighborhoods, budget-friendly options, or rentals that match your family size.
ai_assistant.placeholder: Ask for help finding a property...
ai_assistant.tip: Include city, budget, rent or sale preference, and room count for better results.
ai_assistant.quick_description: Use one of these ideas to start the conversation faster.
ai_assistant.help_1: Suggest listings based on budget, location, and property type.
ai_assistant.help_2: Recommend alternatives when your first criteria are too narrow.
ai_assistant.help_3: Surface property cards directly in the conversation.

prompts.family: Show me family-friendly rentals in Oran under 60,000 DZD.
prompts.investment: Find good investment apartments with 2 bedrooms.
prompts.short_stay: I need a short stay listing near the city center.
